narrative:
Freedom Township (precinct in Wood County) has 963 registered voters, with 45.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.2 percentage points.
